name: query_history
description: Query historical time-series data from Rubix nodes. Returns samples with timestamps, values, and computed statistics including trend and anomaly detection.

filter.description: Haystack filter with optional pipe modifiers (e.g. 'type is "core.trigger" | select out | limit 100')

portHandle.description: Port handle to query history for (default 'output')

range.description: Relative time range: last1h, last6h, last24h, last7d, last30d (default last24h). Converted to from/to automatically.

from.description: Absolute start time (RFC3339, e.g. 2026-04-15T00:00:00Z). Use with 'to'.

limit.description: Max samples per node (default 100). Can also use '| limit N' in filter.
